nl: Find all persons with phone number containing '123'
cypher: MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.phone CONTAINS '123' RETURN p
MATCH (m:Message) WHERE m.text CONTAINS 'bitcoin' RETURN m

nl: Show all images with text about crypto wallets
cypher: MATCH (m:Media) WHERE m.type CONTAINS 'image' AND m.ocr_text CONTAINS 'crypto wallet' RETURN m

nl: Find messages sent between January 1, 2023 and February 1, 2023
cypher: MATCH (m:Message) WHERE m.timestamp >= datetime('2023-01-01') AND m.timestamp <= datetime('2023-02-01') RETURN m

nl: Show all persons who sent messages containing 'meeting'
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:SENT]->(m:Message) WHERE m.text CONTAINS 'meeting' RETURN DISTINCT p

nl: Show all crypto addresses mentioned in messages
Find persons who called the number '+919876543210'
cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:MADE]->(c:Call) WHERE c.number = '+919876543210' RETURN DISTINCT p
